4-dots-swing:
<svg viewBox='0 -10 40 28' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' fill='currentColor'>
  <style>
    @keyframes fg-ia-4d-swing {
      0% {
        transform: rotate(0deg);
        animation-timing-function: ease-out;
      }
      25% {
        transform: rotate(50deg);
        animation-timing-function: ease-in;
      }
      50% {
        transform: rotate(0deg);
        animation-timing-function: linear;
      }
    }
    @keyframes fg-ia-4d-swing-l {
      0% {
        transform: rotate(0deg);
        animation-timing-function: linear;
      }
      50% {
        transform: rotate(0deg);
        animation-timing-function: ease-out;
      }
      75% {
        transform: rotate(-50deg);
        animation-timing-function: ease-in;
      }
    }
    .fg-4d-swing-f {
      animation: fg-ia-4d-swing 1.2s linear infinite;
      transform-origin: center top;
    }
    .fg-4d-swing-l {
      animation: fg-ia-4d-swing-l 1.2s linear infinite;
      transform-origin: center top;
    }
  </style>
  <circle cx='8' cy='12' r='3' class='fg-4d-swing-f'/>
  <circle cx='16' cy='12' r='3'/>
  <circle cx='24' cy='12' r='3'/>
  <circle cx='32' cy='12' r='3' class='fg-4d-swing-l'/>
</svg>

      animation-timing-function: linear;
      animation-iteration-count: infinite;

    .fg_ia_jump_ring_d { animation-name: fg_ia_jump_ringD; }

    @keyframes fg_ia_jump_ringA {
      0%, 4%    { stroke-dasharray: 0 660;  stroke-width: 20; stroke-dashoffset: -330; }

    .fg_ia_wifi_front, .fg_ia_wifi_back {
      fill: none;
      stroke-width: 6px;
      stroke: currentColor;
      stroke-dasharray: 22 66;
      transform-origin: center;
      transform: rotate(-100deg);
    }
    .fg_ia_wifi_back { opacity: 0.5; }

    .fg_ia_wifi_outer circle { stroke-dasharray: 62.75 188.25; }
    .fg_ia_wifi_outer circle.fg_ia_wifi_back  { animation: fg_ia_wifi_circle_outer 1.8s ease infinite 0.3s;  }
    .fg_ia_wifi_outer circle.fg_ia_wifi_front { animation: fg_ia_wifi_circle_outer 1.8s ease infinite 0.15s; }

    .fg_ia_wifi_middle circle { stroke-dasharray: 42.5 127.5; }
    .fg_ia_wifi_middle circle.fg_ia_wifi_back  { animation: fg_ia_wifi_circle_middle 1.8s ease infinite 0.25s; }
    .fg_ia_wifi_middle circle.fg_ia_wifi_front { animation: fg_ia_wifi_circle_middle 1.8s ease infinite 0.1s;  }

    .fg_ia_wifi_inner circle { stroke-dasharray: 22 66; }
    .fg_ia_wifi_inner circle.fg_ia_wifi_back  { animation: fg_ia_wifi_circle_inner 1.8s ease infinite 0.2s;  }
    .fg_ia_wifi_inner circle.fg_ia_wifi_front { animation: fg_ia_wifi_circle_inner 1.8s ease infinite 0.05s; }

    @keyframes fg_ia_wifi_circle_outer {
      0%   { stroke-dashoffset: 25;  }
      25%  { stroke-dashoffset: 0;   }
      65%  { stroke-dashoffset: 301; }
      80%  { stroke-dashoffset: 276; }
      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 276; }

      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 187; }
